name: Wlad Lmarsa
overview: El Mahdi returns to his family after several years of imprisonment, to have his engagement called off by his fiancée Basma, whom his mother seeks to keep away from their lives by all means possible, while he makes fateful family decisions that shock everyone.

trailers.title: مسلسل ولاد المرسى | الحلقة الأولى | باغي ولد
